news.Title: Cisco Systems CEO Sees AI Fueling a “Networking Super Cycle”
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Cisco Systems, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins says AI is driving a “networking super cycle.” He said demand is rising across hyperscalers, enterprises, sovereign clouds and public-sector customers, and Cisco lifted its AI infrastructure target to $9 billion from $5 billion. Security is becoming embedded in the network as agentic AI grows. Robbins argued that separate security appliances won’t be enough for AI agents operating across systems, and pointed to Cisco’s Smart Switches as a way to run security services at line speed. Cisco is leaning on Silicon One, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins states that AI is driving a "networking super cycle," with rising demand across hyperscalers, enterprises, and public sectors.
• Cisco has increased its AI infrastructure target to $9 billion from $5 billion, driven by the need for modern and secure networks.
• The company sees security becoming embedded in the network infrastructure to support agentic AI, with its Smart Switches offering integrated security services.
• Cisco is leveraging its Silicon One architecture, optics, and supply chain control as key advantages in securing AI infrastructure deals, particularly with hyperscalers.
news.Keywords: networking, AI infrastructure, super cycle, security, supply chain

news.Title: 聯博00404A 18日正式開募　All In One 台股投資新選項
news.Content: （財經中心／綜合報導）台股ETF市場添新兵，聯博投信旗下首檔台股主動式ETF—— 00404A 「聯博台灣動能收益 50 主動式 ETF 」（本基金配息來源可能為收益平準金） 自今日（18日）開始募集，並設置每季配息機制，提供投資人一檔兼顧台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 聯博投信推出首檔台股主動式ETF「聯博台灣動能收益50主動式ETF」(00404A)，今日起正式開募。
• 該ETF旨在提供結合台股成長動能與多元收益來源的「All In One」投資選項，解決投資人對市值型與高股息ETF的兩難。
• 00404A採用「三路收益」架構，包含台股股息、已實現賣出選擇權買權之權利金收入及淨已實現資本利得。
• 基金運用選擇權策略，不僅追求現金流，也兼顧策略彈性，並具備稅務優勢。
• 聯博投信強調，其在台灣運用選擇權收益策略已有逾十年經驗，資產管理規模達新台幣2,160億元。

• 川普認為，若當時英特爾與美國政府合作，將能成為全球最大公司，並可能取代台積電在晶片生意中的地位。

• 川普強調美國在AI領域大幅領先中國，英特爾近期CPU需求回溫，預期CPU市場規模將持續成長。

news.Title: 台股敲響4萬點保衛戰？一票網友樂觀喊話：跌就是加碼

news.Title: 台積電才有「真‧2奈米」製程 外資：Intel零威脅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-19 11:32:01 郭妍希 發佈

蘋果(Apple Inc.)傳出與英特爾(Intel Corp.)達成初步代工協議、全球晶圓版圖可能生變，但知名華爾街投資機構Bernstei ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 華爾街投資機構Bernstein認為，蘋果與英特爾的代工協議對台積電(2330)毫無威脅，因英特爾技術落後且晶片數量微小。
• 分析師指出，目前沒有跡象顯示英特爾與台積電的技術差距正在縮小，台積電仍是蘋果最具成本效益的選擇。
• 台積電是全球唯一量產「真‧2奈米」晶片的晶圓廠，其2奈米製程效能相當於三星的3奈米製程。
• 三星和英特爾的晶圓廠可能因地緣政治考量獲得額外訂單，但多集中在成熟製程。
• 報導指出，蘋果已與英特爾達成初步協議，英特爾將為蘋果生產部分晶片，但此協議對台積電影響有限。
news.Keywords: 先進製程,技術差距,地緣政治,晶圓代工,AI複利

news.Title: Jim Cramer has a surprising take on Elon Musk's OpenAI loss
news.Content: Some courtroom wins look better on the scoreboard than on the balance sheet . Wall Street has watched two of them play out in the last quarter-century, from the antitrust case that hobbled Microsoft in 2001 to the one that hung over Google for most of the 2020s, and in both cases the supposed loser walked out larger and more entrenched. That is the awkward pattern that walked into a federal courtroom in Oakland, California, on Monday, May 18. A nine-member advisory jury needed less than two hours to throw out the most-watched case in the artificial intelligence industry, according ...
news.AI_Summary:
• An advisory jury dismissed Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft on a "calendar technicality," ruling he waited too long to file.
• Jim Cramer argues that despite the legal loss, Musk 'won the war' by forcing OpenAI and Microsoft into a lengthy defense that consumed resources and attention.
• OpenAI's valuation has reached nearly $730 billion in private markets, with bankers reportedly securing private funding before the verdict.
• The verdict is seen as a clean win for Microsoft, removing potential financial liabilities and benefiting from any future OpenAI IPO, while Tesla and xAI are also mentioned.
news.Keywords: litigation, intellectual property, valuation, market dynamics, AI ecosystem

news.Title: 記憶體又遭血洗！群聯慘跌停、南亞科崩9％ 兇手竟是這大廠拋出警訊？
news.Content: 記憶體族群今（19）日遭逢利空突襲，盤中湧現爆量恐慌賣壓，指標股群聯亮燈跌停，華邦電、南亞科、旺宏等紛紛暴跌9%，短線多方信心備受打擊。市場利空主要來自硬碟機大廠希捷（Seagate）發出警告，強調公司寧可選擇「技術轉型」也不盲目 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 記憶體族群因硬碟大廠希捷（Seagate）警告產能擴張可能導致過剩，加上DRAM現貨價格雜音，導致群聯跌停，南亞科、華邦電、旺宏等跌幅達9%。
• 希捷執行長表示公司將專注於技術轉型以提升儲存容量，而非盲目擴產，此言論引發市場對半導體業擴產速度的擔憂。
• 分析師指出，DRAM現貨價持續走跌，若與合約價出現「死亡交叉」，可能預示產業趨勢反轉，重演2021年股價超前獲利修正的走勢。
• 法人提醒，台股記憶體族群帶量下殺，技術面壓力升高，建議投資人保持冷靜觀望，待報價與技術面止穩後再布局。
news.Keywords: 記憶體, 產能過剩, DRAM現貨價, 技術轉型, 產業趨勢

news.Title: UBS drops aggressive Broadcom stock price forecast
news.Content: Sometimes the most interesting analyst moves aren't the regular clean upgrades but the ones that look different. A good example is what we see in Broadcom. The analyst firm cut a number, raised a target, and somehow made the bull case stronger in the process. UBS raised its price target on Broadcom ( AVGO ) to $490 from $475 while maintaining its Buy rating. That happened even after significantly reducing its Anthropic-related revenue estimates. The reason? The deal structure changed. And in doing so, it may have quietly improved the quality of Broadcom's AI revenue, not just the quantity. Broadcom ...
news.AI_Summary:
• UBS raised its price target on Broadcom to $490 from $475 while maintaining a Buy rating, despite reducing Anthropic-related revenue estimates.
• The restructuring of the Anthropic deal from full racks to a standard ASIC arrangement is expected to yield higher margins, improving revenue quality.
• Broadcom reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $19.311 billion (up 29% YoY) and AI revenue of $8.4 billion (up 106% YoY).
• The company guided Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue to approximately $22.0 billion (up 47% YoY), with AI semiconductor revenue expected to reach $10.7 billion.
news.Keywords: price target, revenue estimates, gross margin, AI semiconductor, custom ASIC

news.Title: Google, Blackstone launch cloud company as Wall Street races to fund AI boom
news.Content: Google ( GOOG , GOOGL ) and Blackstone ( BX ) are launching an artificial intelligence cloud company, the latest sign that Wall Street is getting deeper in the AI infrastructure race. The joint venture will provide data center capacity, operations, networking, and Google Cloud's Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) as a compute-as-a-service offering. The business ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google and Blackstone are launching a joint venture for an AI cloud company, providing data center capacity and Google's TPUs as a compute-as-a-service.
• Blackstone is making an initial $5 billion equity investment, with the venture expected to bring 500 megawatts of power online by 2027.
• This move signifies Wall Street's increasing investment in AI infrastructure, with major tech firms expecting to spend over $700 billion on AI buildout this year.
• The venture aims to address the growing demand for AI computing power and compete with other cloud providers and chip manufacturers like Nvidia.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, cloud computing, data center capacity, compute-as-a-service, joint venture

news.Title: Tesla makes necessary change fans are going to hate
news.Content: Coming off a year where the company posted its first-ever annual revenue loss, 2026 was always going to be pivotal for Tesla. While CEO Elon Musk told investors that the company would focus on autonomy and humanoid robots this year, car sales account for 73% of Tesla's revenue . When combined with its leasing department, automotive accounts for between 85% and 87% of Tesla's revenue. Meanwhile, Tesla's overall Full Self-Driving (Supervised) adoption rate is climbing , but is still only about ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla is increasing prices for its Model Y variants in the U.S. by $500 to $1,000, with the premium AWD now at $49,990 and Performance at $57,990.
• This price hike follows a previous increase in 2024 and comes amid challenges with declining EV sales and Elon Musk's brand image.
• Automotive sales, including leasing, account for 85-87% of Tesla's revenue, with automotive gross margin (excluding credits) dipping into the red in 2025.
• The company is shifting focus to autonomy and humanoid robots, but faces significant investment and uncertain market demand for these ventures.
news.Keywords: EV pricing, automotive revenue, demand issues, AI investment, operational shift

news.Title: Why Dominion Energy Stock Jumped Today

news.AI_Summary:

news.Keywords: merger, acquisition premium, regulated utility, earnings growth, scale advantage

news.Title: Citi revamps AMD stock price target ahead of key announcement
news.Content: The headline from Citi's May 18 semiconductor note focused on Intel. The $130 price target on a stock that was trading near $107 was the number that traveled. But buried in the same note was a call on a different chipmaker that carries a disclosure most investors have not yet processed. That disclosure, if it is validated at a scheduled event in July, changes the AI chip competitive picture in a specific and meaningful way. Why Citi raised AMD target and kept its neutral rating Citi analyst Atif Malik raised his price target on Advanced Micro Devices to $460 from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Citi raised its price target for AMD to $460 from $358, while also increasing Intel's target to $130, driven by a new CPU total addressable market model.
• The firm maintains a neutral rating on AMD, viewing it as a potential beneficiary of a 'CPU renaissance' driven by agentic AI workloads.
• Citi believes AMD has secured Anthropic as a customer for its MI450 AI accelerator, with a formal announcement expected in July.
• This potential partnership with Anthropic would validate AMD's AI accelerator business, given Anthropic's demanding AI compute workloads.
news.Keywords: price target revision, AI accelerator, CPU market, agentic AI, customer validation

news.Title: OpenAI whistleblower ditches Nvidia, AMD for crypto miners

news.Title: Tesla Just Hiked Model Y Prices for the First Time Since 2024. Time to Buy the Stock?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) quietly nudged Model Y prices higher in the U.S. over the weekend. The Model Y Premium all-wheel drive and Premium rear-wheel drive trims each climbed $1,000 to $49,990 and $45,990, respectively, while the Performance all-wheel drive trim rose $500 to $57,990. The two entry-level Standard trims, by contrast, were left untouched at $41,990 and $39,990. Modest as the changes are, they mark the first U.S. price hike on Tesla's best-selling vehicle in about two years -- and they end a long stretch of discounts and outright price cuts that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla has increased prices for certain Model Y trims in the U.S. for the first time in approximately two years.
• This price hike follows a period of discounts and cuts that impacted automotive gross margins.
• Tesla's Q1 2026 revenue grew 16% year-over-year to $22.4 billion, with automotive revenue also up 16%.
• Gross margin improved to 21.1% in Q1 2026 from 16.3% a year prior, supported by a strong Q1 order backlog.
news.Keywords: pricing strategy, demand, automotive revenue, gross margin, order backlog

全球AI熱潮持續推升科技股與半導體產業估值，市場也開始擔憂，AI投資是否正朝向2000年網路泡沫的翻版發展。不過，美國科技投資圈近期卻出現另一種觀點：真正可能正在幫助市場避免泡沫失控的，竟然是台積電。

曾在富達管理逾 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 華爾街投資大佬貝克認為，台積電保守的擴產策略有助於避免AI產業泡沫化。
• 他指出，AI產業面臨電力、晶圓短缺等「物理限制」，與過去科技革命不同。
• 台積電由經驗豐富的管理層領導，對產業循環有深刻體會，因此不採取過度激進的擴產。
• 貝克認為，若台積電大幅擴產，可能導致市場面臨劇烈修正壓力。
news.Keywords: AI泡沫,半導體限制,保守擴產,產業循環,供給端管理

news.Content: Shares of Shopify Inc. Shares of Amazon have gained 6.4%, while WIX.com and Commerce.com have declined 27.6% and 13.6%, respectively. Although Shopify reported strong first-quarter revenue and GMV growth, management noted that growing merchant usage of AI products, most notably Sidekick, increased LLM costs and said this usage-driven cost dynamic ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shopify (SHOP) shares have declined 25.8% in the past month, underperforming the broader tech sector.
• Increased LLM costs due to higher usage of AI products like Sidekick are impacting profitability, with this dynamic expected to continue.
• Rising transaction and loan losses, primarily from credit, are increasing investor scrutiny on Shopify's financial services exposure.
• Despite headwinds, Shopify's long-term positioning is supported by product velocity, merchant scale, and expanding platform utility, with AI seen as a structural advantage.
news.Keywords: LLM costs, AI adoption, credit risk, financial services exposure, platform utility

news.Title: The AI Inference Supercycle Is Here. These 2 Stocks Will Be the Biggest Winners of This Megatrend (Hint: It's Not Broadcom or Intel)
news.Content: There is a major shift happening in the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure market. While a significant chunk of the spending on AI hardware, such as chips and networking components, has been directed toward the training of large language models (LLMs) so far, inference workloads are now gaining significant traction. The training phase requires a lot of computing power and huge datasets to ensure that the model is trained accurately and is fit for real-world usage. The inference phase, on the other hand, is putting the trained AI models to work ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI inference market is shifting focus from model training to inference workloads, which are gaining significant traction.
• Chip designers like Broadcom and Intel are seeing demand for their inference-focused AI processors.
• Memory manufacturers Micron Technology (MU) and Sandisk (SNDK) are identified as potential biggest winners due to increased demand for memory chips in AI inference.
• Deloitte estimates inference workloads will account for two-thirds of AI data center computing power by 2026, up from 50% in 2025, driving demand for compute and storage.
news.Keywords: AI inference, memory demand, compute, storage, chip designers

news.Title: Can Structural Growth & Durable Demand Fuel the Next Rally in Seagate?
news.Content: Seagate Technology Holdings plc STX has emerged as a key beneficiary of the AI boom, repositioned as a critical enabler of hyperscale AI and cloud storage growth. Seagate reported a strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 performance, fueled by surging demand for mass-capacity storage products from cloud providers and enterprise AI deployments. Per Seagate, AI-driven storage demand is no longer experimental; it is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Seagate Technology (STX) is positioned as a key beneficiary of the AI boom, experiencing strong demand for mass-capacity storage from AI and cloud deployments.
• The company is entering a "new era of structural growth" driven by AI, its Mozaic 4 HAMR platform (up to 44TB per drive), and disciplined execution.
• Seagate's areal-density strategy supports scalable growth with better capital efficiency and lower power usage per terabyte, targeting mid-20% exabyte growth.
• Competitors like Western Digital (WDC) and Micron (MU) are also benefiting from AI-driven storage demand, with WDC focusing on HDDs and MU on HBM solutions.
• STX shares have surged 629.5% in the past year, with fiscal 2026 and 2027 earnings estimates showing significant upward revisions.
news.Keywords: AI Boom, Storage Demand, Hyperscale, HAMR, Structural Growth

news.Title: What to Expect From Nvidia's Earnings on Wednesday
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Nvidia ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) reports fiscal Q1 2027 results after ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is expected to report exceptional AI-driven growth for fiscal Q1 2027, with Wall Street consensus at $79 billion in revenue and $1.81 adjusted EPS.
• This represents 82% year-over-year revenue growth and 135% earnings growth for the company valued at over $5 trillion.
• The key focus for the earnings call will be the 'China question,' specifically H200 approvals and guidance on China Data Center compute.
• Investors will also scrutinize forward Q2 guidance, with consensus around $87.2 billion, where a lower figure could signal deceleration.
• The stock has seen a significant increase, up roughly 68% over the past twelve months.
news.Keywords: Earnings Preview, AI Growth, Data Center Compute, China Market, Guidance

news.Title: Buy Cisco as a New Leader of the AI Networking Infrastructure Space
news.Content: Cisco Systems Inc. CSCO has been benefiting from strong product orders from hyperscalers, enterprises, service providers, the public sector and cloud customers. The company reported blowout third-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings results. CSCO generated record-high revenues primarily due to its networking portfolio, powered by Silicon One, AI-native security solutions and operating systems. Increasing AI workloads at the network edge and the emergence of physical AI are benefiting the industrial IoT portfolio. Consequently, the stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco Systems (CSCO) is recommended as a new leader in AI networking infrastructure, benefiting from strong product orders across various customer segments.
• The company reported blowout Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings, driven by its networking portfolio, including Silicon One and AI-native security solutions.
• Networking revenues increased 25% year-over-year, with record campus networking orders growing over 25% and data center switching orders up over 40%.
• CSCO generated $1.9 billion in AI infrastructure orders in the last quarter, exceeding its fiscal 2026 target, and expects total AI infrastructure orders to reach $9 billion.
• A restructuring effort will reallocate resources towards AI networking, security, silicon, and optics, with raised fiscal 2026 revenue and EPS guidance.
news.Keywords: AI Networking, Infrastructure, Product Orders, Data Center, Restructuring

news.Title: If You Invested $1000 in ON Semiconductor Corp. a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
news.Content: How much a stock's price changes over time is a significant driver for most investors. • The company reported $5.995 billion in revenues for 2025, with its Power Solutions Group (PSG) accounting for 46.8%.
• A $1000 investment made ten years ago would be worth approximately $12,637.99 as of May 18, 2026, representing a 1,163.80% gain.

news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – May 18, 2026 – Zacks Equity Research shares Progyny PGNY as the Bull of the Day and Standex International Corp. SXI as the Bear of the Day. news.AI_Summary:

• The fertility services market is projected to approach $70 billion by 2030, driven by rising infertility rates, delayed parenthood, and corporate adoption.
• Progyny's specialized platform offers better clinical outcomes, reduced healthcare waste, and higher employee satisfaction, making it a strategic tool for employers.
• The company benefits from secular tailwinds including delayed parenthood, rising infertility diagnoses, increased acceptance of treatments, and LGBTQ+ family-building demand.

news.Content: By Ragini Mathur and Utkarsh Hathi May 18 (Reuters) - U.S. stock index futures edged lower on Monday as rising Treasury yields and oil prices weighed, while investors awaited key earnings from Nvidia and Walmart later in the week. • Investors are awaiting key earnings reports from Nvidia and Walmart.

news.Title: Bill Ackman Explained Why He Just Bought Microsoft. But There Are Even More Reasons to Buy This "Magnificent Seven" Stalwart
news.Content: On Friday, billionaire investor Bill Ackman disclosed that his publicly traded hedge fund, Pershing Square USA (NYSE: PSUS) , had established a core position in Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) . Interestingly, according to Pershing's 13-F filing, Ackman sold most of his fund's position in Microsoft competitor Alphabet to do so. Microsoft has lagged the market in 2026, especially other AI stocks, because of a combination of fears, and has fallen to one of its lowest valuations in the past decade. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire investor Bill Ackman has established a core position in Microsoft (MSFT), selling most of his Alphabet holdings to do so.
• Microsoft stock has lagged the market and AI peers due to fears of AI eroding software moats and dependence on OpenAI for Azure's growth.
• Ackman believes these fears are overblown, citing Microsoft's bundled M365 suite's resilience and Azure's hybrid pricing experience.
• Microsoft's AI strategy includes diversification, with a $5 billion investment in Anthropic and a $30 billion cloud computing deal.
• Despite concerns, Microsoft's stake in OpenAI is valued at over $200 billion following OpenAI's recent $122 billion funding round.
news.Keywords: Investment thesis, AI, cloud computing, enterprise software, valuation

news.Title: SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Puts a Price Tag on the Fear of Missing Out
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk has turned science fiction into reality for the better part of two decades, making believers rich and earning the benefit of the doubt from many on Wall Street. Away from rockets and electric cars, his companies are bending reality on another plane – convincing analysts to stretch their traditional valuation tools, and assign multiples based on what one academic calls “optionalities.” Most Read from Bloomberg US and Iran Far From Deal as Bond Rout Piles Pressure on Trump Winners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit Talks Billionaire Rinehart Bets $100 Million on US Defense ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is reportedly targeting a $2 trillion valuation for its upcoming IPO, driven by Elon Musk's track record and futuristic plans.
• Analysts are stretching valuation tools to incorporate 'optionalities,' viewing Tesla more as a robotics company than an automaker.
• Tesla's valuation premium is attributed to Musk's transformative track record, with upside focused on AI, driverless cars, and the Optimus robot project.
• Many analysts credit Tesla's future growth to Robotaxis and Optimus, with vehicle sales seen as a minor long-term revenue source.
• Skeptics caution about the high cost of building physical AI infrastructure, with Tesla planning over $25 billion in spending this year.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, optionality, AI, robotics, growth drivers

news.Title: Citi lifts price targets on Intel and AMD, sees CPU TAM of $132B by 2030
news.Content: Investing.com -- Citi lifted its price targets on Intel and AMD and introduced a new server CPU total addressable market (TAM) model that forecasts the segment could grow by 35% from $29.3 billion in 2025 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Citi has raised price targets for Intel and AMD, introducing a new server CPU Total Addressable Market (TAM) model.
• The CPU TAM is projected to grow 35% from $29.3 billion in 2025 to $131.5 billion by 2030, driven by agentic AI applications.
• Citi forecasts agentic CPUs to be the fastest-growing segment (185% CAGR), reaching $59.4 billion and representing 45% of the market by 2030.
• Citi expects Intel to hold 47% market share and AMD 34% by 2030, raising price targets to $130 for Intel and $460 for AMD.
• AMD is expected to benefit from agentic AI demand and potentially win Anthropic as a customer for its MI450 AI accelerator.
news.Keywords: CPU TAM, AI applications, market share, price target, data center

news.Title: Better Buy: Micron or Nvidia Stock
news.Content: Two of the hottest stocks on the market are Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Micron (NASDAQ: MU) . Nvidia makes graphics processing units (GPUs), while Micron makes memory chips. That makes these two partners rather than competitors. However, there can only be one stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) and Micron (MU) are both benefiting from high data center demand and are key players in the AI training ecosystem.
• Nvidia leads in GPUs with a strong, differentiated ecosystem, earning it a premium valuation.
• Micron operates in the more commoditized memory chip market, experiencing price surges due to current high demand and low supply.
• Micron's revenue growth is projected to be significantly higher than Nvidia's in the near term (261% vs. 79% in upcoming quarters).
• Nvidia is considered a more stable AI investment, while Micron offers higher potential upside but with greater volatility due to market cycles.
news.Keywords: AI ecosystem, GPU, memory chips, revenue growth, market cycle, valuation

news.Title: Warren Buffett's Successor, Greg Abel, Just Sold 16 Stocks, but Piled Into an AI Titan That's Now a Top-5 Position for Berkshire Hathaway
news.Content: Big changes are afoot at Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) . With Warren Buffett retiring as CEO on Dec. 31, 2025, the baton was handed to his longtime understudy, Greg Abel. Though the Oracle of Omaha remains chair of the board, Abel has the final say on Berkshire's day-to-day operations and its massive investment portfolio. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Greg Abel, Warren Buffett's successor at Berkshire Hathaway, has made significant portfolio changes, including selling 16 stocks.
• Alphabet (GOOGL) has been added as a top-five holding, with Berkshire increasing its stake by 204% in Class A shares and initiating a new position in Class C shares.
• The total stake in Alphabet is valued at approximately $23 billion, reflecting confidence in its AI capabilities and cloud business.
• Abel's investment strategy, similar to Buffett's, prioritizes value, which has been challenging in the current historically expensive market.
• Alphabet's strengths include its search monopoly, high-margin Google Cloud segment driven by AI, sustainable moat, and strong financials.
news.Keywords: portfolio management, AI titan, value investing, Google Cloud, strategic allocation

news.Title: Is Amazon Starting an Nvidia-Style Run?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has rocketed higher since the earlier days of the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, surging a mind-boggling 1,500% over the past five years. This is for a very logical reason. The company has built an AI chip empire, offering the most powerful compute to drive the development and use of AI. And this has translated into record-level earnings quarter after quarter. Nvidia continues to gain, rising about 25% so far this year. But it's not the only company on track to win in the current and upcoming stages of the AI boom. Another tech company -- one that's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is showing strong momentum, with shares up over 30% since late March, potentially mirroring Nvidia's AI-driven surge.
• Amazon's e-commerce business benefits from AI for efficiency, while its AWS division is experiencing supercharged growth due to AI services.
• The company plans $200 billion in capital spending for 2026 to meet AI-related demand on AWS, with much of this expected to convert to revenue in 2027-2028.
• AWS offers AI services including its own in-house chips (Graviton, Trainium), which are generating an estimated $20 billion annual revenue run rate.
• Amazon's potential for a stand-alone chips business and the rapid growth of its AWS AI business (reaching a $15 billion run rate) suggest significant upside.
news.Keywords: AI boom, AWS growth, capital expenditure, in-house chips, revenue run rate

news.Title: As chip industry chases AI, U.S. national labs look to newcomers for supercomputers
news.Content: By Stephen Nellis ALBUQUERQUE, New Mexico, May 18 (Reuters) - In a nondescript building on Kirtland Air Force Base on the high desert of New Mexico, liquid-cooled supercomputers gurgle and hum their way through some of the most complex math problems the U.S. government seeks to solve: simulating how hypersonic nuclear weapons would ‌move through the earth's atmosphere, or what would happen if one nuclear warhead detonated near another. More from Yahoo Scout What computing challenges face nuclear ...
news.AI_Summary:
• U.S. national labs are exploring newer chip companies like NextSilicon as traditional suppliers like Nvidia and AMD increasingly focus on AI chips.
• Sandia National Laboratories faces challenges in securing high-precision computing power due to the AI chip focus and supply shortages from established players.
• The race for AI chips is opening markets for smaller players, with Sandia testing NextSilicon's alternative chip architecture.
• A key concern is the decline in double-precision floating point computation performance in some upcoming Nvidia chips, crucial for scientific simulations.
• NextSilicon's chips have passed initial supercomputing tests, potentially positioning them for use in government systems.
news.Keywords: AI chips, supercomputing, semiconductor supply chain, scientific computing, emerging technology

news.Title: Global stocks retreat and bonds wilt as oil climbs
news.Content: By Wayne Cole and Samuel Indyk LONDON, May 18 (Reuters) - Global share markets slipped on Monday as fresh drone attacks in the Gulf shoved oil prices and bond yields higher, stoking inflation worries in a week when the tech bull run will be tested by earnings from Nvidia . A drone strike caused a fire ‌at a nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates, while Saudi Arabia reported intercepting three drones, as U.S. President Donald Trump warned ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Global stock markets declined as rising oil prices and bond yields fueled inflation concerns.
• Geopolitical tensions in the Gulf, including drone attacks, have pushed oil prices higher.
• Bond yields reached multi-year highs, with U.S. 10-year notes hitting a 15-month top.
• Nvidia's (NVDA) upcoming earnings report is a key event that will test the ongoing AI-driven tech bull run.
• Retail earnings, including Walmart, will also be released this week, offering insights into consumer health amid high energy prices.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, inflation, rising yields, earnings test, consumer sentiment

news.Title: Here's how Nvidia stock has historically performed after earnings: Chart of the Day
news.Content: For Nvidia ( NVDA ) investors, the first move after earnings has historically been only part of the story. Buying the stock just before quarterly results has produced modest short-term gains, but the longer-term picture has been much stronger. This chart shows the difference clearly. Since 2016, Nvidia’s post-earnings returns have been positive across every holding period studied. But the edge has been far more ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Historically, Nvidia (NVDA) stock has shown strong long-term performance after earnings reports, with median one-year returns of 87.6% since 2016.
• Short-term post-earnings gains (one day, week, or month) are more modest, averaging 0.3%, 3.3%, and 0.4% respectively.
• Options markets are pricing in a significant post-earnings move (around 6%), aligning with historical volatility around earnings.
• The win rate for positive returns improves significantly with longer holding periods, reaching 78% over one quarter and 84% over one year.
• While the peak one-year post-earnings return has cooled from its AI boom highs, the broader pattern suggests patience is key for investors.
news.Keywords: post-earnings performance, historical returns, holding period, volatility, AI boom

news.Title: 台股高檔震盪 主動式ETF誰最能打？00991A以52.09%持續稱霸
news.Content:
▲2026年5月12日台股資料表格。（圖／CMoney提供）

台股熱度降溫，大盤指數瀕臨4萬點保衛戰，連11天的「兆元成交量」紀錄宣告中斷，投資人心態轉為謹慎。檢視國內台股主動式ETF這波3月底以來的上沖下洗，00991A 以 52.09% 的報酬率位居全市場之冠，是帶領投資人衝鋒的領頭羊。更令市場矚目的是其抗跌防禦力。在 5/7 至 5/18 的市場回檔期間，00991A 僅微幅修正 1.51%，相較於其他同類型產品動輒 4% 至 6% 的跌幅，展現出極強的韌性。這種「大漲小回」的特性，驗證了其策略在波動市況中能有效留住獲利。

台股熱度降溫 主動式ETF攻守力成新焦點

▼領先群防禦落差:獲利保留率決定最終勝負。（圖／NoteBookLM提供）

千點震盪嚇壞市場 獲利了結賣壓浮現

今（18）日盤中一度暴跌超過千點，主要是因為通膨憂慮再度復燃、美債殖利率攀升，加上中東地緣政治衝突推升油價，而川習峰會又缺乏實質突破，於是在市場恐慌情緒蔓延下，台股波段漲多的逢高獲利了結賣壓漸增，終場加權指數下跌280.54點，收在40891.82點，成交值新台幣9904.66億元。

未來可持續觀察3個變數，包括美國和伊朗衝突可否盡快達成協議、並恢復荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）自由通行，此外，美台企業財報公布後、市場對今年和2027年企業獲利預估，以及川習會後美中未來貿易互動關係。

00991A上攻居冠 AI科技含量高 記憶體、PCB、AI伺服器成主攻部隊

根據CMoney統計3/31的本波低點以來至5/7為止，波段漲幅以00991A的52.09%居冠，其他包括00981A、00994A、00987A、00995A也都漲逾五成，值得留意的是，5/7至今的台股回檔期間，00991A的防守力也相對亮眼，期間下跌1.51%位居第三名。

00991A的風格明顯更偏向主攻AI、科技，雖然台積電權重約18%，低於 00985A，但整體科技股比重已來到約92.79%，尤其它更是重壓記憶體、PCB、AI Server 與高速傳輸族群，像是群聯、南亞科、旺宏、華邦電，以及台光電、欣興、南電、金像電等公司。

另外，包括奇鋐、健策、高力、勤誠、緯穎、緯創等 AI 伺服器與散熱供應鏈，也幾乎都是目前市場最核心的 AI 主流族群。

在類股輪動加速的環境下，主動型 ETF 表現出現顯著分化，其中 00991A 憑藉「上攻領先、回檔穩健」的數據實績，反映出主動型產品在掌握產業脈動上的絕對效率，成為市場關注焦點。

news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:52:42 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(18)日走勢分歧。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7516.04點，上漲22.86點或0.31%，盤中最低觸及7142.71點、盤中高點為7636.20點；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1111.09點，下跌18.73點或1.66%。受到國際油價飆升與美國長短期公債利率大幅走高影響，開盤出現恐慌性拋售，一度觸發程式化交易暫停機制，隨後因政府對三星勞資分歧表態而改變風險預期，整體呈現高檔波動、指數走勢分歧的格局。

盤面上，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)與SK Hynix(000660.KS)在盤中遭遇急跌後出現明顯回補買盤，最終分別上漲3.88%、1.15%，Samsung Electronics Pfd(005935.KS)亦回升。市場報導指出，法院對Samsung Electronics勞資爭議相關禁制令，以及政府高層介入協調共同降低了對生產中斷的擔憂，促成大型半導體股的短暫抗跌。

此外，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)跌5.29%，HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)跌3.91%，LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)跌2.16%，顯示非半導體權值股承壓情況明顯。資金動向方面，盤面呈現外資持續撤離，散戶與機構接手的結構性特徵，程式化交易亦顯示非套利賣壓偏重，放大了盤中波動。

台股焦點：新產(2850.TW)

《韓股》KOSPI重挫逾6% 權值股走弱/類股齊跌

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 挖掘台積電外的優質企業 AI、璞玉要開創台股雙動能
news.Content:
台積電 在台股大盤指數漲跌擔任要角，常被稱為是「一個人的武林」；但台積電之外，台股組成的上市企業中不少是台灣各產業的冠軍，甚至是台積電強而有力的供應鏈。證交所今天(18日)舉行「AI領航x璞玉發光」開創台股雙動能新時代資本市場成長論壇，希望透過雙軌互動，形塑具成長及有韌性的台灣資本市場。

台北股市今年5月站上4萬點後持續創新高，AI相關科技股亮眼。為平衡資本市場，台灣證券交易所積極推廣還未被發掘的優質上市企業，由台灣指數公司在今年1月編制「台灣璞玉指數」，透過嚴謹篩選的機制，挑選出在各行業深耕且獲利穩定的「璞玉」企業，並進一步推出「璞玉中小型100指數」及「璞玉50指數」，提供市場更多元、更具抗跌及防禦能力的投資選擇。

證交所18日舉行「AI領航x璞玉發光」開創台股雙動能新時代資本市場成長論壇，希望透過雙軌互動，形塑具成長及有韌性的台灣資本市場。林修銘說：『(原音)接下來我們也會在5月20號來辦理一系列的璞玉指數成分股的業績發表會，邀請璞玉公司親自跟大家做說明，公司的未來的發展及展望。6月的Computex的展期中，我們也邀請台灣的AI產業界代表在國際舞台上齊聚交流，分享營運的績效跟台灣技術的優勢，向國內外再次展現我們台灣的硬實力及台灣資產產業多元發展的面貌。』

過往台股上漲總集中在台積電一家企業，不過，財訊雙週刊社長謝金河在論壇中指出，雖然目前台股資金仍集中在少數板塊，但近期也可以觀察到不只台積電受青睞，台積電強而有力的供應鏈也吸引到市場的目光。

舉例來說，像是中砂經過台積電培訓，成為台積電鑽石碟的最重要供應商，股價翻轉10多倍；另外，頌勝科技原本以生產鞋墊起家，後來成功轉型，目前核心業務為研發與製造半導體化學機械平坦化(CMP)研磨墊，為國內少數能打破美、日外商壟斷，切入台積電等先進製程供應鏈的關鍵耗材廠。另外還有新應材、山太士等許多台灣傳產企業華麗轉身後，股價從水餃股1元多翻千倍，躋身台股「千元俱樂部」，因此他認為台灣的傳產企業不能再坐等景氣變化，必須加緊技術升級與轉型，和台灣在掌握全球AI的關鍵地位中共同成長。

news.Title: Is Alibaba a Buy on AI and Cloud Upside Potential?
news.Content: Despite reporting plummeting profitability in its recent fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report (for the period ended March 30), Alibaba (NYSE: BABA) shares jumped as investors were excited about the Chinese company's artificial intelligence (AI) road map. The stock is now trading around breakeven on the year, as of this writing. Let's dig ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alibaba's AI-related product revenue experienced triple-digit growth for the 11th consecutive quarter.
• The company's cloud intelligence segment revenue increased by 38% to $6 billion, with adjusted EBITA surging by 57% to $550 million.
• Alibaba's core e-commerce segment revenue rose 6% to $17.7 billion, but segment EBITA plunged 40% to $3.5 billion.
• Overall revenue grew 3% to $35.3 billion, while adjusted EBITDA dropped 61% to $2.4 billion.
• The article mentions a company providing critical technology for Nvidia and Intel, but the focus remains on Alibaba's performance and prospects.
news.Keywords: AI, cloud computing, e-commerce, profitability, growth drivers

news.Title: 台股又爆下殺千點驚魂！注意看「3大防線」進場時機曝光
news.Content:
台股今（18日）盤中一度重挫超過千點，最低觸及40170.17點，險些摔破4萬點大關，即使最後狂拉僅下跌280.54點，但投資人對後市仍感到憂心，分析師江國中認為，本周台股有三道鋼鐵防線，分別是40576、39840以及39487，只要跌到附近，大盤的下檔空間極為有限。

台股修正 會殺到多慘？

摩爾投顧分析師江國中於今周刊專欄指出，等到下一次日線MACD柱狀體收腳的時候，只要柱狀體由長變短、跌勢趨緩，就是最強烈的止跌訊號。如果伴隨跳空缺口，就是多頭攻勢再起，上攻45000點的關鍵訊號。

台股近期漲多修正劇烈，雖屢屢挑戰站穩42000點關卡，但市場追價意願不高，上周周K線更是留下1200點的上引線，顯示上方賣壓沉重，加上美國通膨升高，30年期美債殖利率衝破5%，台股充斥獲利了結情緒。

最大敵人又來 後市不容樂觀

展望後市，在國際局勢尚未穩定之前，台股恐難避免震盪，甚至出現進一步回檔的可能性，本周關注重點在於輝達財報，預計在台灣時間周四（21日）上午出爐，相關概念股成為焦點。

另外，美國聯準會也會在周四公開4月利率決策會議的紀要，可以更明確了解聯準會官員們的立場，以及移交新主席華許（Kevin Warsh）前的討論細節，高度關注是否展現較為鷹派的說法或態度。

美國銀行分析師哈奈特（Michael Hartnett）則對金融市場提出警告，由於市場估值已高，通膨使30年期美債殖利率突破5%的生死線，投資人湧入股市和科技股的情緒接近尾聲，6月開始將是獲利了結的時機。

news.Title: CPO封測議題夯，封裝目標中介層層級，穎崴衝刺光電同測商機
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】股價超過萬元的測試介面廠穎崴(6515)積極爭取CPO商機，而2026年雖是被視為CPO技術商轉元年，但不論是封裝還是測試，均有技術門檻得跨過，封裝部分，台積電(2330)揭露COUPE今年將自on PCB推進到on substrate(載板)，但目標是on interposer(中介層)，而測試端，穎崴證實，得達到光電同測。人工智慧進入全新的發展階段，科技大廠指出，2027年全球AI基礎設施需求將達至少1兆美元，AI運算在過去兩年需求提升1萬倍，AI運算以翻倍方式增長爆發，矽光子及共同封裝光學可望成為延續這波需求算力提升的重要關鍵技術，雖然「銅退光進」已成產業重要趨勢，但業界均認為，短期內不可行，還會是處於「銅光並進」的架構。

共同封裝光學（Co-Packaged Optics）是將電子和光子積體電路共同封裝在同個中介層的技術，後者將光引擎直接搬到晶片旁，大幅縮短距離、功耗；同時晶圓大廠和IC設計大廠於近期紛紛展示CPO技術的原型，2026年被視為CPO技術商轉元年，更是技術邁向放量的關鍵年。光就封裝部分，CPO定義，是將Optical Engine(光學引擎)直接整合於Interposer，並與ASIC、HBM共同封裝，再透過載板整合。日前台積電釋出COUPE(緊湊型通用光子引擎)技術，也有技術進程，今年下半年能自on PCB推進到on substrate，但目標是on substrate。

而測試端，測試介面廠穎崴技術主管孫家彬在「CPO的進化論—矽光子的先進測試方法論（The Evolution of Co-Packaged Optics : Advanced Testing Methodologies for Silicon Photonics）」的演說中提到，進一步說明CPO為先進測試、高階封裝與半導體測試介面所帶來全新的機會與挑戰。

孫家彬表示，隨著矽光子指標大廠在CPO傳輸訂出更高規的頻寬（400G）及高速（224 Gbps/ 448Gbps）的規格，穎崴的CPO解決方案持續升級，從Wafer/Chip Level、Package Level到Module Level等三個測試級別推出相對應的解決方案。其中，WLCSP晶圓級探針卡（WLCSP Probe Card）部分，Wafer Level可用在「上電下光」的測試，Chip Level則可用在「上光下電」的解決方案；同時，穎崴獨創微間距對位雙邊探測系統解決方案（Double Sided Probing System Total Solution）則針對Package Level(封裝層級)提供的CPO測試；穎崴的跨世代超導測試座HyperSocket主攻Module Level(模組層級)的測試需求。穎崴在此大趨勢已做好準備，目標是能取得更全面性的光電同測市場商機。

news.Title: Trump tells Fortune he should have asked for bigger Intel stake
news.Content: May 18 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump said he "should have asked for more" of a stake in ‌Intel on behalf of the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Former U.S. President Donald Trump stated in a Fortune interview that he should have secured a larger stake in Intel for the U.S. government.
• The Trump administration had previously taken a 10% stake in Intel, valued at over $50 billion, as part of a $10 billion investment in U.S. chip manufacturing.
• Trump expressed regret for not imposing tariffs on chips from China earlier, believing it would have benefited Intel.
• He suggested a strategy of slowly selling the government's Intel shares to avoid stock price depreciation.
• The interview occurred before Trump's visit to Beijing, which yielded no major trade breakthroughs.
news.Keywords: government stake, chip manufacturing, trade policy, investment, market position

news.Title: 台股衝4萬點過熱？謝金河一句話定心丸 點名「5檔低調股」有看頭
news.Content:
台股躍上四萬點奔馳，引發外界熱議台股會不會過熱。財訊傳媒董事長謝金河今（18）日表示，現在台灣資本市場的根基比過去更穩，關鍵就在於台積電的基本面支撐。他指出，台積電第一季每股盈餘達22.08元，若全年EPS接近100元，即使股價來到2000元以上，仍有其合理性，「你說台積電要崩盤大跌，我認為不容易。」

謝金河指出，過去台股大漲後，市場往往擔心接下來就是崩盤，但這一次台灣資本市場的結構已經不同。台積電不只是台股權值核心，更是台灣產業、稅收與資本市場的重要支柱。只要台積電維持穩定，台股便具備相當強的支撐力。

謝金河更表示，台積電真正的影響力，還在於帶動整個供應鏈。他提到，台積電帶動的供應鏈公司有上百家，這也呼應證交所推動「璞玉計畫」的意義。台灣市場除了台灣50等大型權值股外，更應該讓具備成長潛力的中小型企業被投資人看見。

他還特別提及5檔深藏在傳統產業、卻因切入台積電本土供應鏈的潛力股，包括「中砂」、「新應材」、「碩成」、「高明鐵」、「三太士」。

談到台灣整體經濟表現，謝金河表示，今年台灣各項經濟數據表現出色，政府稅收也相當充裕，因此他建議，政府應重新思考財政資源的使用方式。他認為，與其每次都被動討論普發現金，不如把錢用在「刀口上」，例如提高公務人員、大學教授、醫護人員等薪資待遇。

謝金河也呼籲企業界，台灣企業近年獲利表現亮眼，除了回饋股東，也應讓員工共享企業成長成果。他以韓國SK海力士與三星為例指出，SK海力士因HBM業務表現亮眼，獲利大幅成長，進而提高員工分潤；相較之下，三星因業務範圍較廣，手機、面板等部門表現不一，導致內部薪酬分配壓力浮現，甚至引發員工不滿。

他提醒，台灣企業若獲利持續創高，老闆也應思考如何讓員工獲得更好回報，否則企業內部也可能出現分配不均的壓力。謝金河表示，這不只是企業治理問題，也是台灣下一階段經濟發展必須面對的重要課題。

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌近1%、連三跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:05:52 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(18)日走弱，連續三日下跌，呈現震盪整理格局。日經225指數收於60815.95點，下跌593.34點或0.97%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3826.51點，下跌37.46點或0.97%。整體賣壓主要受到原油價格走高、日美長期利率上升，以及地緣政治風險相關影響，使買盤動能明顯轉弱。

權值股與類股表現方面，AI與半導體相關權值股遭獲利了結，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)與東京威力科創(8035.JP)走弱，藤倉(5803.JP)與軟銀集團(9984.JP)也承壓；Recruit Holdings(6098.JP)、部分精密機器股及服務業相對抗跌。汽車類股與輸送用機器、紡織製品、批發業與建設業多數走弱。

《歐股》憂通膨失控、歐股挫 特諾本逆勢飆

《日股》權值股帶動，日經收漲0.84%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: A Kevin Warsh–Jerome Powell Fed Showdown Could Rattle Markets -- Here's What Investors Should Brace For
news.Content: Most of us have heard the adage "out with the old, in with the new." But what happens when the "old" remains "in" alongside the "new"? We're about to find out with the changing of the guard at the Federal Reserve. Jerome Powell's term as Fed Chair concluded on May 15, 2026. His replacement, Kevin Warsh, has officially taken the baton. For decades, previous Fed Chairs have stepped down from the Federal Reserve Board of Governors at the same time their term as Chair ended. But Powell is breaking that 78-year tradition. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jerome Powell's term as Fed Chair concluded, but he will remain on the Board of Governors alongside new Chair Kevin Warsh, breaking a 78-year tradition.
• Powell's continued presence could lead to market-rattling showdowns due to differing ideologies on monetary policy, particularly concerning the Fed's balance sheet and interest rate strategies.
• Warsh favors aggressively shrinking the balance sheet and relying on interest rates, while Powell used tools like the 'dot plot' and public statements for market guidance.
• Warsh views AI as a disinflationary force, potentially allowing for rate cuts, whereas Powell believes AI contributes to higher inflation.
news.Keywords: Federal Reserve, monetary policy, interest rates, inflation, market uncertainty

news.Title: Here's What I Think Is Going on With Sandisk Stock
news.Content: What's the biggest winner among S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) members so far this year? It isn't Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) or any of the other so-called "Magnificent Seven" stocks . Instead, it's a stock that has only been trading publicly for less than 15 months -- Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) . Even after a recent pullback, Sandisk's shares have still soared higher than those of any other S&P 500 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) has been the biggest winner among S&P 500 members this year, with shares soaring significantly.
• The company's Q3 fiscal 2025 revenue surged 97% quarter-over-quarter, with expectations for another 34% growth in Q4, driven by soaring demand for NAND memory used in AI infrastructure.
• Despite strong performance, risks include growth prospects being priced in, potential interest rate hikes affecting enterprise spending, and the cyclical nature of the memory market.
• Sandisk is viewed as a transformation story, benefiting significantly from the AI boom, with multi-year supply agreements indicating strong market dynamics.
news.Keywords: NAND memory, AI infrastructure, revenue growth, market cyclicality, stock performance

news.Title: 台股一度重挫逾千點 三大法人賣超434億 外資大砍452億
news.Content:
台股今（18）日開低震盪，盤中一度下挫逾1000點，終場以40891點作收，成交量9904.66億元。三大法人合計賣超434.5億元，其中外資大賣452.41億元。

觀察籌碼動向，今日自營商賣超139.26億元，投信買超157.17億元，外資及陸資賣超452.41億元，合計賣超434.5億元。

權值股中，台積電開低震盪，下跌25元，收2240元，鴻海收平盤來到248.5元，聯發科則來到3400元，上漲4.29%。

受惠於AI浪潮與元件需求，被動元件概念股延續漲勢，國巨*、金山電攻漲停，立隆電大漲8.29%，華新科漲5.58%，興勤也有2.67%的漲幅。

此外，受SpaceX最快將於6月提早登陸那斯達克的消息激勵，低軌衛星族群全面走強，事欣科、華通、敬鵬、耀登、昇達科、啟碁等衝漲停，兆赫也有逾6%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 台股衝破4萬點！0050現在能買嗎？專家揭搭配「1投資組合」很重要
news.Content:
隨著台股衝破4萬點大關，市場情緒沸騰到最高點，街頭巷尾、網路論壇處處都在討論投資熱潮，許多投資人擔心錯過行情，紛紛進場買股，但也有不少人心中浮現疑問：「0050現在還能買嗎？」《優活健康網》特別摘錄投資專家雨果所撰寫的文章，分享ETF背後運轉機制，其實影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點。

0050現在還能買嗎？

很多人在0050創高後，心裡第一個浮現的問題通常是「現在還能不能買」，尤其看到新聞天天在討論台股創新高，很多人難免會開始擔心是不是已經太晚進場。這種情緒其實很常見，因為大部分人對投資的直覺，通常都是「漲高了就危險」。

但如果回頭看過去的歷史，會發現0050在很多階段都曾被認為太貴。30元的時候有人嫌高，50元的時候也有人不敢買。甚至當0050突破100元時，市場依然充滿「現在進場會套牢」的聲音。只是多年後回頭看，那些高點很多最後都變成相對低點。

這也是指數化投資很有趣的地方。長期向上的關鍵，通常不是短期價格，而是企業獲利是否持續成長。0050本質上，其實就是台灣前50大市值企業的集合。它的核心邏輯，某種程度上是在押注台灣大型企業未來的競爭力。

只是現在的0050，與過去有一個很大的不同。那就是台積電的權重已經越來越高，目前0050的台積電權重很接近60%。換句話說，0050的走勢，與半導體產業已經高度連動。

這也讓現在的0050，比較像大型科技股ETF。不完全是過去大家印象中的「平均分散投資」。有些人看到這樣的集中度，會開始擔心風險。因為如果未來科技產業進入修正，波動可能也會變大。

影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點

但另一派看法則認為，這其實只是市場自然演變的結果，因為市值型ETF本來就是誰強誰權重高。這幾年AI產業快速成長，半導體企業獲利大幅提升，資金自然會集中在最具競爭力的企業。所以0050權重變化，本質上比較像市場投票的結果，而不是經理人主動偏好某些公司。

只是很多投資人容易忽略一件事。真正影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點，而是能不能長期持有。因為市場大漲時，幾乎每個人都覺得自己能長期投資，真正困難的，通常是在市場下跌的時候。

像2008年金融海嘯時，台股曾經大跌超過50%。2022年美國升息循環時，科技股也曾出現劇烈修正。即使是長期向上的資產，中間依然可能經歷很大的波動，而很多人往往是在這個階段離開市場。

有人原本規劃長期投資，但當帳面虧損20%、30%後，開始出現焦慮與不安。有些人會擔心工作收入，也有人開始懷疑市場是不是要崩盤，最後不是輸給市場本身，而是輸給情緒與資金安排。

搭配保守資產也很重要

所以投資人應該要思考一件事。除了0050之外，是否也要搭配一部分保守資產。 這種做法不是看空市場，比較像是替未來的不確定性保留空間。因為保守資產最大的作用，很多時候不是提高報酬，而是降低整體波動與心理壓力。

例如有人會保留部分現金。因為現金除了流動性，也代表未來的選擇權。當市場修正時，有現金的人通常比較不容易恐慌。甚至還有機會慢慢分批投入。但如果資金全部壓在股票，市場一跌，壓力可能就會明顯放大。尤其當生活開銷與投資資金沒有切開時。

另外也有人會配置部分債券ETF。像是美國公債、

news.Title: 《台股盤後》回測月線、收跌280點；下影線逾700點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 15:45:54 新聞中心 發佈

美股上周五在各期公債殖利率明顯走揚下皆收黑、亞幣/亞股與美股電子盤今(18)日也多為弱勢表現，台股則亦以低盤開出、回測月線支撐，且19大類股中更僅對指數貢獻不大的其他、建材營造收紅，導致加權指數早盤一度跌逾千點，惟在聯電不受台積賣世界影響、開低走高收漲0.9%，搭配聯發科挾GOOGLE I/O大會將登場而收漲逾4%，輔以昇達科等衛星股、被動元件漲價題材的國巨*等強勢表現，終場加權指數收在40891.82點，下跌280.54點或0.68%、留下逾700點的下影線，成交量9904.66億元。

受到油價跳高引發全球通膨疑慮、公債殖利率跳升衝擊，美國四大指數15日全面拉回。亞洲股市方面，因日本10年債殖利率揚升，半導體相關股下挫，拖累日經225指數今日以低盤開出後、一度重挫逾1,000點，終場下跌0.97%；韓國綜合股價指數(KOSPI) 今日走勢震盪，終場上漲0.31%，主要係三星上漲逾3%。

台股市場氣氛偏向保守，賣壓主要集中在權值股與短線漲多族群。電子族群普遍走弱，台積電收在2240元，下跌1.1%，日月光投控跌逾6%，鴻勁、金像電、台達電、致茂、創意、南亞科、廣達等都收黑，不過聯發科盤中由黑翻紅，上漲4.29%。另外，被動元件今日獲買盤點火，國巨*亮燈漲停，禾伸堂、金山電、光頡、台嘉碩、大毅等也都衝上漲停，同時SPACE X下月將掛牌帶動昇達科收漲停、群創漲逾7%。

在類股表現上，造紙、化工股表現疲軟，分別下跌2.56%、2.1%，正隆、長興均跌逾6%，勝一、永光、國精化、永豐餘等都走弱。紡織纖維、化學生技醫療、電機機械、汽車類股也都有超過1%的跌幅，表現相對弱勢。而四大表現最佳類股依序為數位雲端上漲1.4%，主要係受基本面題材帶動；其他類股則在三貝德漲停、弱勢股寶成反彈激勵下收漲0.91%；綠能環保在政策支持與相關訂單消息下、上揚0.90%；光電類股在供應鏈逐步調整後則出現溫和回穩，上漲0.37%。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計賣超434.5億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)賣超452.4億元，投信買超157.17億元，自營商賣超139.26億元。

台股焦點：光頡(3624.TW)

台股焦點：立敦(6175.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 微軟明明賺翻！比爾蓋茲基金賣光持股為哪樁？「台股代工、散熱等AI鏈老神在在」專家：盯住2大實質指標更要緊
news.Content: 根據美國證券交易委員會（SEC）最新公告，蓋茲基金會信託（Gates Foundation Trust）已將持有的微軟（Microsoft）股票全部清倉，持股數量正式歸零，此舉代表比爾．蓋茲慈善體系正式結束了與他 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 比爾蓋茲基金會信託已全數清倉其持有的微軟股票，總計約32億美元，代表其與微軟長達數十年的股權連結正式結束。
• 此次賣股是基於基金會的「落日計畫」，旨在逐步結束運作並將資產投入慈善用途，預計年度捐款提升至90億美元，需要大量現金流。
• 此舉並非看壞微軟或AI前景，比爾蓋茲本人仍持有約430億美元的微軟股票，是重要股東之一。
• 微軟在雲端與AI領域表現強勁，持續擴建資料中心，對台灣AI伺服器供應鏈如鴻海、廣達、緯創等有持續拉貨動能。
• 專家認為，台股AI族群走勢更應關注微軟的季度財報及輝達晶片出貨等實質經濟指標，而非基金會的股權異動。
news.Keywords: 慈善基金會, 股權變動, AI供應鏈, 實質指標, 財富規劃

news.Title: 受益人會議通過！群益00685L擬分割1拆24 將成最便宜正2台股ETF
news.Content: 根據群益投信官網公告資訊顯示，其所經理之「群益臺灣加權指數 ETF 傘型證券投資信託基金之群益臺灣加權指數單日正向 2 倍證券投資信託基金 (00685L-T ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 群益投信旗下台股ETF 00685L（群益臺灣加權指數單日正向 2 倍 ETF）的受益人會議已通過分割決議，擬進行1拆24。
• 分割後，預計將成為市場上發行價最低、投資門檻最低的台股槓桿型ETF，有利於吸引小資族群參與。
• 截至5月15日，00685L上市以來報酬率達2373.29%，遠優於同期間台灣加權報酬指數的2倍報酬率，顯示其在多頭趨勢下的滾入獲利機制效果顯著。
• 分割預計時程包含公告決議結果、分割比率與日程、最後交易日、停止交易與申贖等，實際日程以群益投信官網公告為準。
• 專家建議，在AI硬體需求帶動的投資趨勢下，具資本成長需求的投資人可考慮市值型ETF外，也納入槓桿型ETF。
news.Keywords: ETF分割, 槓桿ETF, 投資門檻, 報酬率, 多頭趨勢

news.Title: 不蓋房改當股神？ 皇翔狂砸126億買台積電 海撈7.7億狠甩本業獲利
news.Content: 台股近年在AI題材帶動下漲勢驚人，不只散戶掀起全民炒股熱潮，就連建商也加入「股海淘金」行列。根據《經濟日報》報導，上市建商皇翔建設近年大舉進軍股市，今年以來光投資台積電、台達電 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 上市建商皇翔建設近年積極投入股市，今年以來對台積電、台達電、南亞科、旺宏等個股的交易金額已超過126億元，遠高於購地金額。
• 皇翔首季本業小幅虧損，但透過股市操作大賺超過7.7億元，獲利表現遠超本業，被市場戲稱為「另類投顧公司」。
• 此現象反映了房地產資金轉向股市的趨勢，尤其在房市買氣轉弱的情況下，建商將資金投入股市尋求更高報酬。
• 專家提醒，儘管AI產業及台灣經濟發展強勁，但股市投資應量力而為，避免過度槓桿操作，以免面臨劇烈波動風險。
• 過度使用融資或質押借款進行股票投資，可能因槓桿過大而導致潛在的巨大虧損。
news.Keywords: 跨業投資, 股市操作, 資金流向, 風險控管, 槓桿操作

news.Title: Global stocks skid, bonds buckle as oil climbs
news.Content: By Wayne Cole SYDNEY, May 18 (Reuters) - Asian share markets were on the skids on Monday as fresh drone attacks in the Gulf shoved oil prices and bond yields higher, while the AI euphoria underpinning the tech bull run will be tested by earnings from Nvidia this week. A drone strike caused a fire at a nuclear power plant in the United Arab ‌Emirates, while Saudi Arabia reported intercepting three drones, as U.S. President Donald Trump warned that Iran must act "fast" to reach a deal. More from Yahoo Scout What earnings will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Global stock markets declined due to rising oil prices and bond yields, influenced by fresh drone attacks in the Gulf.
• Nvidia's upcoming earnings report will be a key test for the AI-driven tech bull run.
• The Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed, leading to rapidly draining global oil inventories and concerns of price spikes to $130-140pb.
• Bond markets were hit hard, with US 10-year yields reaching a 15-month high, raising fears of central bank tightening and potential recession.
• Asian markets, including Japan, South Korea, and China, experienced declines, with China's retail sales and industrial output showing sluggish growth.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, oil prices, bond yields, inflation, market sentiment

news.Content: 美國與伊朗的緊張局勢未見緩和，直接衝擊全球金融市場的風險偏好，加上地緣衝突導致國際避險情緒蔓延，日股與韓股今（18）日開盤同步續挫，台股也難逃一劫，開盤重挫並一度大跌超過1,000點，然 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受地緣政治緊張局勢影響，台股開盤重挫逾千點，但隨後跌幅收斂，市場資金湧入AI供應鏈，顯示對基本面重視度提升。
• 聯電因具備低本益比與穩健殖利率優勢，成為避險資金與投信的青睞標的，顯示市場偏好防禦性權值股。
• 電子通路族群如擎亞、增你強等股價上漲，暗示下游拉貨動能強勁，緩解市場對基本面轉弱的擔憂。
• 分析師建議觀察2至3天，確認大盤站穩5日線且國際局勢緩和後再行加碼，避免盲目搶反彈。
• 法人認為，儘管短期受通膨與地緣政治干擾，但半導體與AI產業基本面強勁，中長期多頭目標不變，急跌是買點。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治,AI供應鏈,基本面,權值股,避險

news.Title: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Supply Chain Finance Platform Selected by Glencore for $2.55B Program
news.Content: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE: FIS ) is one of the best low priced technology stocks to buy according to hedge funds . On May 12, FIS announced that its Supply Chain Finance Platform, formerly known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has been selected by Glencore to power an inaugural $2.55 billion trade receivables securitization program for its oil and gas business.
• The FIS Supply Chain Finance Platform, hosted on Microsoft Azure, enables corporates to monetize receivables and unlock working capital.
• This transaction, backed by a consortium of six financial institutions, is one of the largest oil and gas trade receivables transactions executed.
• The platform provides technology infrastructure, operational support, and complex reporting for multi-jurisdictional transactions, offering real-time monitoring and transparency.
news.Keywords: supply chain finance, securitization, working capital, financial technology, cloud hosting

news.Title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Launches Compute Scale-Up Server 3250 for Critical Workloads
news.Content: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE: HPE ) is one of the best low priced technology stocks to buy according to hedge funds . On May 11, HPE announced the availability of the HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3250, a purpose-built server designed for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has launched the HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3250, designed for large, in-memory databases and critical business workloads.
• The server is powered by Intel Xeon 6 processors and features a modular architecture scaling from 4 to 16 sockets, supporting up to 64 TB of DDR5 memory.
• It is engineered for high performance in applications like enterprise resource planning and emerging agentic AI workloads, with advanced security and resiliency features.
• The system is the first scale-up server validated by the SAP BW Edition HANA benchmark with at least 48 TB of memory, offering significant performance boosts.
news.Keywords: server technology, in-memory databases, critical workloads, AI hardware, enterprise solutions

news.Title: 台股盤中重挫千點！低點反彈6百點　分析師提醒提高警覺

• 建議避開高本益比、低殖利率、法人轉賣的高位階股，轉而布局低本益比、高殖利率的價值型股票。
• 今年前四月台股基金報酬率表現亮眼，遠優於大盤，顯示主動型基金具備超額報酬能力。

news.Keywords: 漲多拉回,價值型股票,AI趨勢,盈餘成長,主動基金

news.Title: 台灣晶片優勢恐倒數18個月？美專家驚曝「1到2奈米差距」
news.Content: 台積電是台灣的護國神山和矽盾，在全球科技與地緣政治中扮演關鍵地位，但美國創投家帕里哈皮提亞在最新《All-In Podcast》節目中指出，18個月後台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國創投家認為，18個月後台灣可能因美國本土半導體產業成長及中美自主供應鏈建立，失去戰略重要性。
• 專家指出，美國距離建立完整本土高階晶片能力僅剩「1到2奈米」差距，一旦突破，對台灣產能依賴將大幅下降。
• 全球半導體供應鏈正朝「去集中化」發展，美國與大陸加速自主半導體產業，削弱台灣作為全球核心供應樞紐的重要性。
• 有評論者反駁此觀點，認為台灣的戰略重要性不僅限於晶片，批評此論調在戰略與道德上極度貧乏。
• 專家認為，華為投入巨資發展本土晶片，台積電美國新廠已開始生產，顯示去中心化趨勢。
news.Keywords: 半導體戰略,自主供應鏈,去集中化,技術差距,地緣政治風險

news.Title: 〈焦點股〉台積電擬出售持股 世界跌停深鎖 三家子公司同步重挫
news.Content: 台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 上周宣布計畫出售世界先進 (5347-TW) 約 8.1% 的持股，將資源專注在核心業務 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電計畫出售世界先進約8.1%持股，以專注核心業務，此舉導致世界先進股價跳空跌停。
• 此利空消息亦衝擊台積電集團子公司，包括創意、精材、采鈺股價全面重挫，精材打入跌停。
• 台積電此次出售世界先進持股約15.2萬張，持股比將從27.1%降至約19%，預計交易金額約241.45億至295.11億元。
• 若以176.5元為交易價格計算，台積電處分利益約達718.16億元。
• 儘管台積電強調不影響與世界先進的策略合作，市場反應仍劇烈，世界先進股價深鎖跌停。
news.Keywords: 股權處分,核心業務,集團子公司,財務投資,股價重挫

news.Title: 抄底王Q1加碼亞馬遜、半導體股 清倉航空股
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 11:54:51 黃智勤 發佈

有「華爾街抄底王」之稱的知名投資人泰珀(David Tepper)首季大舉加碼科技巨頭亞馬遜(Amazon)和叫車平台Ub ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 知名投資人泰珀（David Tepper）首季大舉加碼科技巨頭亞馬遜(Amazon)和叫車平台Uber。
• 泰珀也增持了Sandisk、美光(Micron)和台積電(2330)等半導體股，顯示對AI基建和記憶體市場的看好。
• 當季泰珀大舉減碼中概股，並將手上三檔航空股全數清倉，反映其對市場趨勢的判斷。
• 美伊戰爭爆發導致航空燃油飆漲，對航空業帶來挑戰，是泰珀清倉航空股的原因之一。
• 泰珀因在股市崩跌時進場抄底並獲豐厚報酬，被稱為「華爾街抄底王」，其持股變動被視為市場風向球。
news.Keywords: 價值投資,科技巨頭,半導體股,部位調整,市場風向球

news.Title: 台股資金潮退卻？投顧：量能仍在可控範圍
news.Content: 台北股市繼上週五下挫逾500點後，今天(18日)一開盤受鄰近亞洲股市開盤走跌影響，不到10分鐘就大跌逾千點，也讓外界質疑台股資金潮是否退卻？國內投 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股因鄰近亞洲股市走跌影響，開盤重挫逾千點，但投顧認為是乖離率過高修正，中長期基本面未變。
• 台股4月創下單月點數與漲幅歷史新高，5月以來持續走升，但技術面面臨修正壓力。
• 川習會實質利多有限，加上美股上週五表現弱勢，影響亞洲股市表現。
• 分析師預期，AI趨勢未變，長線趨勢仍可期，但短期內指數可能陷入震盪整理修正。
• 投顧認為，指數整理過程中量能稍縮在可控範圍，基本面未變，長線趨勢仍可期待；新台幣匯率走貶加大台股壓力。
news.Keywords: 乖離率修正,技術面,基本面,量能,震盪整理

news.Title: Atreides點名亞馬遜Trainium是黑馬，台積電保守擴產成AI防泡沫關鍵
news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】外電報導，科技投資人、Atreides Management投資長貝克(Gavin Baker)在最新訪談中拋出多項挑戰市場共識的AI判斷，直指當前最被低估的AI晶片不是 ...

• Alphabet's Q1 2026 investor letter highlighted a 17% growth in core search revenue and margin expansion across Google services and the $70 billion run-rate Google Cloud business due to AI.
• The company's elevated capex spending is deemed justified by Wedgewood Partners due to massive operating leverage, accelerating revenue, and high returns on invested capital.
news.Keywords: AI integration, cloud computing, search dominance, revenue growth, margin expansion

news.Title: This AI Stock Has Every Quality Warren Buffett Looks for in a Long-Term Hold
news.Content: As arguably the most well-known investor in stock market history, it makes sense that people tend to follow Warren Buffett's philosophies and advice when it comes to picking great stocks. No investor is perfect, but Buffett's sustained success over decades before his retirement is, to put it lightly, impressive. Buffett himself isn't the biggest fan of tech stocks, but there are a few artificial ingelligence (AI) stocks that fit the qualities that Buffett looks for in a business. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) exhibits qualities Warren Buffett looks for in a long-term investment, including a strong competitive moat derived from its enterprise software reach (Windows, Office 365, Azure).
• The company has a history of consistently returning value to shareholders, evidenced by 21 consecutive years of dividend increases and significant share buyback programs.
• Microsoft's ingrained presence in business operations creates high switching costs, contributing to its long-term stability and profitability.
• Despite not being a traditional dividend stock, its consistent dividend growth and substantial share repurchases are attractive to long-term investors.
news.Keywords: competitive moat, enterprise software, shareholder value, dividend growth, share buybacks

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be the Next $5 Trillion Company
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) sits alone as the only company that's worth $5 trillion or more. Still, there's another company knocking on the door of this exclusive club: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) . Alphabet isn't too far off and currently has a market cap of nearly $4.8 trillion, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) is nearing a $5 trillion market capitalization, currently at nearly $4.8 trillion, positioning it as a potential next trillion-dollar company after Nvidia.
• The company has rapidly advanced in AI, becoming a leader with its generative AI models and seamless integration into Google Search, which saw a 19% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1.
• Google Cloud revenue grew by 63% in Q1, boosted by sales of Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) to external clients, establishing it as a key platform for AI application development.
• While Alphabet's stock is up over 25% year-to-date, its valuation is at a decade-high, suggesting capped near-term upside compared to some peers, especially until further AI division growth is realized.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, AI leadership, Google Cloud growth, valuation, revenue acceleration

news.Title: 5 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks That Have More Than Doubled This Year and Can Still Go Higher
news.Content: As the world embraces artificial intelligence (AI), and companies that provide development infrastructure are thriving, AI stocks are driving higher market gains. As a group, the industry is outperforming the market. One standard signal is the Nasdaq-100 , which features trending tech stocks and is beating the S&P 500 this year. Many exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that focus on AI are doing even better. Consider the Roundhill Generative AI and Technology ETF , the iShares U.S. Power and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Several AI stocks have more than doubled this year, outperforming the broader market, with companies like Bloom Energy, Sandisk, Lumentum, Micron Technology, and Intel showing significant gains.
• Bloom Energy reported a 130% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1 and raised full-year guidance, turning operating cash flow positive.
• Sandisk's NAND flash memory products are in high demand for AI data storage, with Q3 FY2026 revenue up 251% year-over-year, driven by a 233% increase in data center revenue.
• Lumentum's optical products are crucial for high-speed data centers, with Q3 FY2026 revenue up 90% year-over-year, and the company reported a GAAP operating profit.
• Micron Technology's revenue increased 70% year-over-year in Q2 FY2026, with earnings per share rising significantly due to demand for memory chips in AI applications.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, revenue growth, data center demand, memory chips, infrastructure providers

news.Title: Another billionaire dumps mega-cap stock for AI bet
news.Content: Stanley Druckenmiller is one of the most-watched money managers on Wall Street , and his Duquesne Family Office Q1 2026 13F filing just landed. The headline number is brutal for Alphabet bulls. Duquesne sold all 385,000 shares of Alphabet ( GOOGL ) Class A stock during the quarter. That same stake had been aggressively built up just one quarter earlier , from roughly 102,000 shares to 385,000. Amazon got the same treatment. Duquesne cut its Amazon ( AMZN ) position from 737,940 shares down to just 9,539 shares, a 99% reduction. Where did the money go? Mostly into Broadcom ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stanley Druckenmiller's Duquesne Family Office sold its entire stake in Alphabet (GOOGL) and significantly reduced its Amazon (AMZN) position in Q1 2026.
• The capital from these sales was largely redeployed into Broadcom (AVGO), a key AI custom silicon maker, with a new stake of 195,955 shares.
• Druckenmiller views Broadcom as a strategic AI chip investment, designed to create custom AI accelerators (ASICs) that are more cost-effective than GPUs for specific workloads.
• Broadcom reported Q1 FY2026 AI semiconductor revenue of $8.4 billion, up 106% year-over-year, with guidance for $10.7 billion in AI sales for Q2.
• The exits from Alphabet and Amazon are interpreted as a rotation from crowded mega-cap AI trades into infrastructure plays like Broadcom, rather than a negative call on AI itself.
news.Keywords: portfolio rotation, AI infrastructure, custom silicon, mega-cap exits, strategic investment

news.Title: How Much Will SpaceX Stock Be Worth by 2030? Here's What History Says.
news.Content: With whispers of a valuation approaching $2 trillion, SpaceX stands on the precipice of potentially the largest initial public offering in history. Yet forecasting the company's stock price at 2030 feels more like an astrology project than astute financial analysis. SpaceX must overcome regulatory hurdles and make significant technological leaps over the next few years to meet investors' sky-high expectations. Let's explore where SpaceX stands today, detail the company's vast opportunities, and examine some sobering lessons from recent high-profile IPOs. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is approaching a potential $2 trillion valuation, with projections for the largest IPO in history.
• The company's valuation has rapidly increased, from $350 billion in late 2024 to an estimated $1.5 trillion currently, with an IPO valuation eyed between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion.
• SpaceX's business segments include reusable rockets, Starlink global broadband, and a burgeoning focus on AI infrastructure, leveraging its network and launch capacity for orbital data centers.
• Analysts estimate SpaceX's revenue to be between $15 billion and $18 billion, implying a price-to-sales multiple exceeding 100 based on its IPO valuation.
• The article discusses the potential of SpaceX's AI ambitions and draws parallels with the trajectories of recent tech IPOs like Palantir and Snowflake.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, space technology, AI infrastructure, revenue projections, market potential

news.Title: Warren Buffett Successor Greg Abel Just More Than Tripled Berkshire's Stake in This "Magnificent Seven" Stock. Is It a Buy?
news.Content: When Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) filed its first quarterly 13-F under new CEO Greg Abel late last week, one move stood out from the rest: In his first three months running the conglomerate, Abel boosted Berkshire's stake in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) by 224%, lifting the position to nearly 58 million shares worth about $23 billion. That makes the Google parent one of Berkshire's seven largest equity holdings. Of course, the stake was relatively modest ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Greg Abel, Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, more than tripled the company's stake in Alphabet (GOOGL), increasing it by 224% to nearly 58 million shares, now valued at approximately $23 billion.
• Alphabet reported a 22% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1 to $109.9 billion, marking its fastest growth pace in over two years and the 11th consecutive quarter of double-digit growth.
• Operating income jumped 30% to $39.7 billion, with operating margins expanding to 36.1%, driven significantly by Google Cloud's 63% revenue growth to $20 billion and tripled operating income.
• Enterprise AI solutions are a primary growth driver for Google Cloud, with revenue from products built on gen AI models growing nearly 800% year-over-year in Q1.
• Despite substantial capital expenditures ($35.7 billion in Q1) and raised full-year guidance ($180-$190 billion), Alphabet's stock valuation remains reasonable at a P/E ratio around 30, reflecting its accelerating growth and expanding margins.
news.Keywords: stake increase, revenue acceleration, margin expansion, Google Cloud, AI growth driver

news.Title: Is Micron the Next Nvidia?

The stock trades at a forward P/E below 10, while the semiconductor industry median is around 30. If you squint, it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) reported a significant Q2 FY2026 revenue of $23.9 billion, up 196% year-over-year, with gross margins exceeding 70%.
• The company's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) is critical for AI accelerators, with capacity sold out through 2026 and shortages expected next year.
• Micron's return on equity is 40%, and its addressable market could reach $100 billion by 2028, positioning it as a compelling 'pick-and-shovel' play in the AI ecosystem.
• Unlike Nvidia, which designs AI accelerators and controls the software ecosystem, Micron is a component supplier vulnerable to price competition from peers like Samsung and SK Hynix.
• The stock trades at a forward P/E below 10, significantly lower than the semiconductor industry median of around 30, reflecting market concerns about the cyclical nature of the memory market and long-term pricing power.

news.Title: Where are Amazon’s headquarters? Seattle and beyond

news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's original headquarters are located in Seattle, Washington, spread across the Puget Sound area.

news.Title: Is Silicon Motion Technology the Next Sandisk?

• The company's Q1 revenue was $342.1 million, exceeding its own forecast of $306 million.
• SIMO shares have nearly doubled since its Q1 results and tripled year-to-date.

news.AI_Summary:

• 新製程相較於22奈米製程eHV解決方案，可降低40%功耗並縮小35%晶片面積，延長電池續航力。

news.Title: Will 2026's CapEx Rebound and 2nm Ramp Be Catalysts for Entegris?
news.Content: Entegris, Inc. ENTG is positioned at the intersection of rising materials intensity and artificial intelligence (AI)-led node migrations. news.Title: How AI Nodes Boost Demand for Entegris Consumables
news.Content: Entegris, Inc. ENTG sits in the flow of artificial intelligence-driven node migration, where each new process step raises the penalty for contamination and pushes fabs toward tighter purity control. That dynamic can make consumables demand feel steadier because it tracks wafer starts and process complexity, not just equipment spending. With node transitions increasing “content per wafer,” Entegris is trying to capture more materials intensity in critical steps. The company’s positioning in filtration, selective etch, chemical mechanical planarization, and advanced deposition is central to that playbook. ENTG’s AI-Linked Node Migration Tailwinds As semiconductors move ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Entegris (ENTG) benefits from AI-driven node migration, where increased contamination penalties and tighter purity control boost demand for consumables.
• The company's positioning in filtration, selective etch, chemical mechanical planarization, and advanced deposition supports higher 'content per wafer'.
• Q1 2026 results showed mid-single-digit sales growth (5% YoY to $811.9 million) and improved profitability, with unit-driven revenues up ~7% YoY.
news.Keywords: AI, semiconductor nodes, contamination control, consumables, materials intensity

3.私募對象及其與公 ...
